user_query:
I’m consolidating my options trading logs offline. Please do the following:
1) Read input/trades.csv (first row is a header). For each data row, create two log entries using the local trading tracker: one with command "run" and one with command "analyze". Use this exact value format for both logs: TRADE|symbol=<SYMBOL>|action=<ACTION>|qty=<QTY>|price=<PRICE>|note=<NOTE>.
2) After logging, read the single search term from input/search_terms.txt and search the tracker history for that term. Write the full search output to output/search_results.txt.
3) Save the tracker’s stats output to output/stats.txt and the recent activity output to output/recent.txt.
4) Create output/session_summary.json containing: { "trades_logged": <number of data rows in input/trades.csv>, "analyze_logged": <same as trades_logged>, "search_term": "<term from input/search_terms.txt>", "contains_matches": <true if output/search_results.txt includes at least one matched line containing the term> }.
Use only relative workspace paths. Do not write outputs anywhere except under output/.
